data.title: Paubox launches AI-powered Inbound Email Security for healthcare, addressing 89% of IT leaders' AI critical need.
data.description: In San Francisco, Paubox, a top provider of HIPAA compliant email security, introduced its latest groundbreaking product, Inbound Email Security. This AI-powered solution exceeds traditional rule-based filters by utilizing generative artificial intelligence. Phishing attacks continue to be the primary reason for email security breaches in healthcare, with 89% of healthcare IT leaders recognizing the importance of AI and machine learning in combatting email threats.
Monday FX Option Expiries

data.title: Gold prices near record highs amidst Trump-Cook legal battle, trading at $3,450/oz, up 1%. Silver surges 2% to $39.70/oz, up 35% year-to-date. Fed's preferred inflation gauge at 2.9%. Fed Chair suggests possible rate cuts.
data.description: Gold prices surged near record highs on Friday, hitting $3,450 per ounce amid fears of political interference in U.S. monetary policy due to President Trump's attempt to fire Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook. The SPDR Gold Trust climbed nearly 1%, with gold marking its fourth consecutive session of gains and breaking out of a four-month sideways range due to concerns over inflation and central bank independence. Silver also surged, reaching $39.70 per ounce, up 35% year-to-date, outpacing gold's 32% gain. The Core Personal Consumption Expenditures price index rose to 2.9% year-over-year in July, its highest in five months. Fed Chair Jerome Powell hinted at rate cuts at the recent Jackson Hole symposium.

data.title: $5B Bitcoin whale buys Ethereum, swapping $216M of BTC for ETH.
data.description: An affluent individual with a substantial amount of Bitcoin decided to diversify their portfolio by trading $216 million worth of BTC for Ethereum on Friday.
Russia: The decision to send a conscript to military service has been extended to two conscription campaigns, according to the resolution.

data.title: Arzopa to unveil new portable displays and digital frames at IFA 2025, showcasing innovative tech.
data.description: A leading global digital display technology company, Arzopa, is set to showcase a range of new products at IFA 2025 in New York on August 29. The lineup demonstrates the brand's commitment to being a top-tier expert in portable imaging, emphasizing premium quality, innovation, and reliability. The company's participation at the event underscores its dedication to staying at the forefront of technological advancements. Visitors can look forward to experiencing firsthand Arzopa's latest offerings designed to enhance digital display experiences.

data.title: SEGG Media reveals revamped website at seggmediacorp.com post turnaround, begins growth phase with sports, entertainment, and gaming assets.
data.description: Fort Worth, TX - On August 29, 2025, SEGG Media Corporation revealed the launch of their revamped corporate website, seggmediacorp.com. The NASDAQ-listed (SEGG, LTRYW) sports, entertainment, and gaming conglomerate unveiled the new site, which marks the completion of their turnaround effort and the start of a vigorous growth stage. Owner of popular platforms like Sports.com, Concerts.com, and Lottery.com, the Company aims to solidify its presence in the digital space with this dynamic hub.

data.title: CoinShares AUM rises by 26% to $3.46B in Q2, profits reach $32.4M. Plans US listing amid Bitcoin and Ether surge.
data.description: In the second quarter, CoinShares reported a profit of $32.4 million and has announced intentions for a listing in the United States. Executives are optimistic about the momentum in the latter half of the year, especially with the surging values of Bitcoin and Ether reaching new highs.

data.title: Theon International Plc to hold Capital Markets Day on Nov 6 in Athens to showcase "THEON Next" Vision & Strategy. Email cmd@theon.com for event registration. More details on Benzinga.com.
data.description: On 29 August 2025, Theon International Plc (THEON) announced details of its upcoming Capital Markets Day (CMD) where it will introduce its vision and strategy for future growth, known as "THEON Next." The company aims to solidify its position as a market leader in optronics and expand globally in modern warfare. The CMD is scheduled for 6 November 2025 in Athens, Greece, at Divani Apollon Palace & Thalasso at 3:00 pm local time. Executives, Leadership Team, and Design & Development Team members will host the event for registered investment professionals, both in-person and virtually. Interested individuals can inquire about registration by contacting cmd@theon.com. Following the CMD, all presentations, materials, and event recordings will be accessible on THEON's website. THEON has already established itself as a frontrunner in... For more information, visit Benzinga.com.
